mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEST_CHUNK_SOURCE (ID, COL1, COL2, COL3, PROCESSED) VALUES (#{id}, #{col1}, #{col2}, #{col3}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, COL1, COL2, COL3 FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID) rn FROM TEST_CHUNK_SOURCE t WHERE PROCESSED = 'N' ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= (#{offset} + #{size}) ORDER BY ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEST_CHUNK_TARGET (ID, COL1, COL2, COL3) VALUES (#{id}, #{col1}, #{col2}, #{col3})
